text:
There once was a tiny mole named Mavis. Every day she would explore tiny burrows just under an oak leaf. Mavis loved her quiet life. She lived entirely on beetles. She dug these little holes to hide them. There was nothing else Mavis liked.

One day a large owl flew overhead. Owls loved moles—what delightfulness could they hunt? Owl eyes shiny like stars. Owl feathers... oh wow.

Owl swooped down. Oh no.

"Noooo," moaned Mavis. But it was too late.

Owl didn't notice Mavis. Nothing could have warned an owl. Owl just scooped her up and took her back.

Owl ate plenty that night.

You see, Mavis didn't like beans.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
